L1.area: N-dimensional image processing and labeled array operations

L2.description: A use-after-free vulnerability exists in a Python C extension where a reference count on a list object is prematurely decremented during error handling, potentially allowing freed memory to be accessed by subsequent operations.

L3.area: N-dimensional image processing and labeled array operations
L3.description: A use-after-free vulnerability exists in a Python C extension where a reference count on a list object is prematurely decremented during error handling, potentially allowing freed memory to be accessed by subsequent operations.

ground_truth.reason: A premature reference count decrement on a Python list object in the error handling path of a C extension function causes a use-after-free, allowing potential access to freed memory.
